title: alyssum saxatile f. variegatum
intro: Alyssum saxatile f. variegatum is a flowering plant species, commonly known as Variegated Rock Candy Myrtle or Variegated Rock Candy, belonging to the family Boraginaceae. The plant is known for its small white flowers and attractive foliage, which has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The leaves of the plant have been used to treat a range of health issues, including digestive problems, fever, and respiratory issues, due to their high concentration of antioxidants and other beneficial compounds. In herbal preparations, the leaves of Alyssum saxatile f. variegatum are often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness their medicinal properties and health benefits.
